titleStmt.title: SII 23.109: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 109. (A.R. No. 109 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the north wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This is an inscription of the 3+1+1st year (expressed also as the 3rd year and 1072nd day) of king Kulaśēkharadēva with his title Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ. It records the transfer, by order of the king, of the kaḍamai and uḻudānkuḍi (tax and rent ?) on the kārāṇmai lands at Pāppāṉkuḷam belonging to the temple of Nālāyira Viṇṇagar-Emberumāṉ at Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi, which had been originally granted to one Sundara Pāṇḍya-Malaiyarāyaṉ by Sokkaiyaṉ (king Sundara-Pāṇḍya ?) in favour of the temple itself. The inscription registers both the royal order to get the document engraved on stone and copper and its actual execution by the temple, represented by eleven temple executives after it was communicated to them by the mahā-sabhā of Rajārājachaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ [rāja]
rājacaturvedimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicciya
yira viṇṇakarāḻvār koyil nampu ceyvāṉukkum śrīvaiṣṇa
kkum Ivvā(ā)ḷvār kārāṇmait tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa Iḷaṅkaṟavai
pāppāṉkuḷattu tiruvāḻikkallukkuḷpaṭṭa nilattil naṉcey puṉ cey Uṭpa
cuntarapāṇṭiya malaiyarāyaṉukku muṉpu cokkaiyaṉ kuṭuttaruḷiṉa kaṭa�
yum Uḻutāṉkuṭiyum Ivaṉait tavuttu maṟṟum meppeṟpaṭṭiṉavun
laicekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Ivvāḻvārkku ka
tom Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu cantirātittaval cellakkaṭava tāka Ivvo
laippaṭiyey kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ivai maturotaya pā
ṇṭiyataraiya ṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu 3 nāḷ 1000 7 10 2 Ivai ceḻiyataraiya ṉeḻuttu
śrī rājarājaccaturvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ōlai kallaṭaik kuṟicci nālāyiravi
ṇṇakar Emperumāṉ koyilil nampuceyvāṉum tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavar kaḷum kaṇṭu In
nāyaṉār kārāṇmait tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Iḷaṅkaṟavaip pāppāṉkuḷat til nālu tiruvāḻik
kallukkuṭppaṭṭa nilattil kaṭamaiyum Uḻutāṉkuṭiyum cuntarapāṇṭiya malaiyarāyaṉait tavittu I
nnālāyiraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉukku śrīkulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu pacāṉmutal ka
ṭamaiyum Uḻutāṉkuṭiyum kuṭukkaveṉṟu brasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukap paṭiye kallilum cem
pilum veṭṭivittukkoḷka Ivai tiruppattūr caturagni Eḻuttu Ivai valavūr sarvakratu
Ejñamutti Eḻuttu Ivai śrīkataiāḷvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṅkippuṟattut tirumāliru
ñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tuṟumuṇṭūr kecavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai korovi Āḷavantāṉ
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ātaṉūr virasvāmi rāttaṉāṉa tiruvāykulatātar Eḻuttu Ivai Emappeṟūr śrīdha
raśarmmaṉ śrīkṛṣṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai toṟuttalai Atirātrayaāji Eḻuttu Ivai Iṭaittuṟai somaiyāji
śrīkaiyilāsamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Iṭaiyālukkuṭi tirumāliruñ colai nārāyaṇaṉ dāmoda
raṉ Eḻuttu ḷa
Digital edition of SII 23.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
